Article.ArticleTitle: Unlocking the power of implementation research.

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: Declarations. Ethics approval and consent to participate: Not applicable. Consent for publication: Not applicable. Competing interests: All authors work for or received funding from the UNDP/UNICEF/World Bank/WHO Special Programme for Research and Training in Tropical Diseases (TDR).

Reference.Citation: Sheikh K, Agyepong I, Jhalani M, et al. Learning health systems: An empowering agenda for low-income and middle-income countries. The Lancet. 2020;395:476–7.
